summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in AI-powered applications, scalable web platforms, and React Native mobile development. Experienced in building production-grade healthcare systems, AI-integrated SaaS platforms, WhatsApp automation systems, and advanced wellness applications using FastAPI, React, Next.js, React Native, PostgreSQL, and LLM technologies.

details: Relevant Coursework: Database Systems, Software Development, Computer Architecture

achievements: Built scalable frontend systems using Next.js and React ecosystems.
Developed backend APIs and integrated full-stack workflows using FastAPI and Node.js.
Worked on production-level CRUD systems, authentication, and database architecture.
Delivered multiple production-grade AI and full-stack projects across web and mobile platforms.
Designed multi-agent AI workflows using LangChain and LangGraph focused on reliability and latency optimization.
Collaborated on various software development projects.
Assisted in frontend and backend development tasks.
Gained hands-on experience with modern tech stacks and production environments.

projects.title: Nexora AI Dashboard
projects.description: Agentic AI-powered productivity platform for project management, meetings, and workflow automation. Built with FastAPI + LangGraph backend.

projects.title: Project Management Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time analytics-focused project management dashboard with KPI reports, calendar scheduling, and budget tracking.

projects.title: NCAST Podcast App
projects.description: Cross-platform podcast streaming mobile application using React Native and Supabase. Features offline playback and push notifications.

projects.title: Vitalise Wellness Yoga App
projects.description: AI-powered yoga platform with interactive voice coaching and personalized plans using Groq AI and FastAPI.

projects.title: HealthCore Clinic Appoinment Chatbot
projects.description: Healthcare management system with physician dashboards and an AI-powered WhatsApp voice assistant.

projects.title: Luminae Skin Intelligence
projects.description: AI-powered clinical skin analysis platform using Hugging Face Transformers, OpenCV, and PyTorch.
